token_accounting.sample_unit: one replay from one player perspective
token_accounting.entity: one token per entity instance with a non-null attribute at a timestep
token_accounting.upgrade: one token per listed cumulative upgrade at a timestep
token_accounting.input: all self tokens plus all zero-fog enemy tokens, with one delimiter per player per timestep
token_accounting.output: all enemy tokens, with one delimiter per timestep and one terminal [END] token
